ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "page_id" TEXT /* ID of the page visited */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user (if logged in), otherwise NULL */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser used by the user */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser engine used by the user */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system used by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., pageview, click, scroll) */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the page belongs to */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of the page (e.g., blog, CV, home) */,
  "page_category" TEXT /* Category of the page */,
  "page_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of the browser (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_rendering_engine" TEXT /* Rendering engine used by the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser engine */,
  "engine_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of the browser engine (e.g., JavaScript, layout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of the operating system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "os_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the operating system (e.g., 32-bit, 64-bit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_segment" TEXT /* Segment the user belongs to (e.g., premium, free) */,
  "user_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data retention policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the data retention policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the data retention policy */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Period of time data is retained (in days) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the policy applies to (e.g., user interactions, user data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the real-time dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the real-time dashboard */,
  "dashboard_url" TEXT /* URL of the real-time dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL of the reporting tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the user segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the user segment (e.g., browser type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)
